description: 'Alias for /testing — generates xUnit tests for the file or feature in context.'
agent: 'agent'
tools: ['search/codebase', 'search/usages', 'edit/files']
argument-hint: '<file or feature to test>'

# Generate tests

This prompt is an alias for [/testing](./testing.prompt.md). Use that prompt — it covers unit, integration, and architecture tests with the project conventions, builder usage, and coverage targets.

If you arrived here because you typed `/generate-tests`, the parent prompt is the same content. Both are kept for discoverability.
